basic_details.job_title: Bilaspur District Hospital MD Medicine Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Bilaspur District Hospital MD Medicine Notification 2026 has been released on 19 December 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Bilaspur District Hospital MD Medicine Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 70 years who possess an MD in Medicine qualification with registration in CG Medical Council are eligible to attend this walk-in recruitment drive. The walk-in interview for Bilaspur District Hospital MD Medicine Recruitment 2026 will be held on 25 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and check complete recruitme

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 70 years

qualification.details: MD in Medicine with registration in CG Medical Council is compulsory.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Bilaspur District Hospital recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the post of MD Medicine. This is a contractual position offered by the Bilaspur District Hospital.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the MD Medicine post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the MD Medicine post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the MD Medicine position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the MD Medicine post will receive a salary of Rs. 93750 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the candidates?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for candidates is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 70 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the MD Medicine post is scheduled for 25-05-2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the required qualification for the MD Medicine post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MD in Medicine with mandatory registration in the CG Medical Council to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the MD Medicine recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Bilaspur District Hospital located?
faq.answer: The Bilaspur District Hospital is located in Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh. The exact venue address will be available in the official notification.
